news.t: Unlocking Smart Beta Innovation: TMX VettaFi to Acquire RAFI Indices
RAFI Indices Announces First ETF: Research Affiliates Deletions ETF (NIXT)

holdings.infoBox: NIXT is an equity ETF with a total of 212 individual holdings. The top holdings are Integra LifeSciences Holdings stock at 0.79%, Okta, Inc. at 0.75%, Enphase Energy at 0.72%, Insight Enterprises at 0.71%, and Xerox Holdings at 0.69%.

overview.description: The Research Affiliates Deletions ETF (NIXT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Research Affiliates Deletions index. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap value equities comprised of recently deleted stocks from a market cap-weighted index. The investment premise is that depreciated stock prices will revert to their average levels NIXT was launched on Sep 9, 2024 and is issued by RAFI Indices.
